_comment: Sketchy Garage Doors — gva-wide. Drives copy/SEO/design/imagery/pricing. Keep DISTINCT from siblings (see _shared/sites-registry.md).
_coverageTowns_note: Started with 6 priority cities (gva-wide: start 3-5, expand to ~20). Each gets a unique service-area page. Others listed in coverage section + schema.
smsBody: Hi Sketchy — my garage door needs help. My issue is:
voice: self-aware/edgy — 'Sketchy name. Spotless work.' Resolve the joke instantly; pair every laugh with a hard trust signal. Radical transparency, anti-scam.
localDetails: coastal rain & salt air rusting cables and springs

design.motionPersonality: crisp/snappy with hazard-tape accents; tight reveals, no slow cinematic drift

imagery.styleBlock: photorealistic documentary photography, shot on 35mm, natural Pacific-Northwest daylight, soft overcast, realistic skin and worn materials, candid, ordinary true-to-life working people, no studio lighting, no retouching, slightly muted colours
imagery.brandBlock: charcoal near-black work jackets with small hazard-yellow chest logo + hazard-yellow caps; Ford Transit wrapped matte near-black with hazard-yellow diagonal stripe, 'SKETCHY GARAGE DOORS' + 'info@sketchygaragedoors.ca' on the side, BC plate; near-black + hazard yellow; NEVER a phone number on the wrap

springPricing._note: Distinct from siblings. Hidden behind footer toggle. Marked up as Offer/PriceSpecification.

singleSpring.label: Single spring replacement
singleSpring.blurb: Replace one broken torsion spring. Best when the other spring is newer and healthy.

twoSpringsNewCables.label: Two springs + new cables
twoSpringsNewCables.blurb: Replace both springs as a matched pair and install fresh cables — the smart standard repair.

twoSpringsHighCycle.label: Two high-cycle springs
twoSpringsHighCycle.blurb: Premium springs rated roughly double the cycles — for busy doors that go up and down all day. Cables included.

freeWithEveryJob: Free safety inspection with every spring job
Written quote before we touch a thing
springPricing.rangeNote: Most Lower Mainland spring jobs land between $189 and $429. No $19.99 bait. No surprise fees.

partnerProgram.headline: We get more calls than we can take — partner with us for vetted overflow jobs
